code:
import io
import string

fn is_space(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn is_lower(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 97 and b <= 122
end

fn get_byte(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    0
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut result = ""
mut i = 0
mut first_word = true

while i < n
  while i < n and is_space(get_byte(line, i))
    i = i + 1
  end
  if i < n
    let start = i
    while i < n and not is_space(get_byte(line, i))
      i = i + 1
    end
    let stop = i
    let first = get_byte(line, start)
    mut word = ""
    if is_lower(first)
      word = "#{string.from_byte(first - 32)}#{string.substring(line, start + 1, stop)}"
    else
      word = string.substring(line, start, stop)
    end
    if first_word
      result = word
      first_word = false
    else
      result = "#{result} #{word}"
    end
  end
end

println(result)
